title: Bouncer
wikitext:
{{External|rs|rsc}} {{Otheruses|the quest boss fought during [[Fight Arena]]|the [[Nightmare Zone]] variant|Bouncer (Nightmare Zone)}} {{Infobox Monster |name = Bouncer |image = [[File:Bouncer.png|250px]] |release = [[23 July]] [[2002]] |update = Members' quests |members = Yes |combat = 137 |size = 2 |examine = Postie Pete's worst nightmare. |xpbonus = 0 |max hit = 13 |aggressive = Yes |poisonous = No |attack style = [[Stab]] |attack speed = 4 |slayxp = 116 |attributes = demon |cat = Hellhounds |assignedby = krystilia,vannaka,chaeldar,nieve,duradel |hitpoints = 116 |att = 120 |str = 120 |def = 120 |mage = 1 |range = 1 |attbns = 0 |strbns = 0 |amagic = 0 |mbns = 0 |arange = 0 |rngbns = 0 |dstab = 0 |dslash = 0 |dcrush = 0 |dmagic = 0 |drange = 0 |immunepoison = No |immunevenom = No |immunecannon = No |immunethrall = No |respawn = 50 |id = 1224 }} '''Bouncer''' is a [[hellhound]] that is fought during the [[Fight Arena]] quest. He is the pet of [[General Khazard]]. It is possible to [[Ranged|range]] or [[Magic|mage]] him from behind the skeletons that lie scattered around the arena. It is also possible to use a [[halberd]] to attack him from one of these [[safespot]]s. Being a hellhound, he is vulnerable to [[demonbane]] weapons and counts as a hellhound for [[Slayer task]]s. '''Note: 10 HP accounts require''' [[Guthix rest#(4)|Guthix rests]] '''in order to kill Bouncer. Bouncer's Max Hit is 13, which is also the HP given by a''' [[Saradomin brew#4 dose|Saradomin brew]]. '''Through both the use of''' [[Ring of recoil]] '''and''' [[Dynamite(p)]], '''Bouncer IS killable.''' It is recommended that players use [[Protect from Melee]] if fighting Bouncer at close range because of his accurate attacks. He can be fought in the [[Nightmare Zone]] after the quest is complete. [[Bouncer (ghost)|Bouncer's ghost]] later appears in [[The General's Shadow]] [[miniquest]], and the player must defeat him once more. ==Location== {{LocTableHead|league=yes}} {{LocLine |name = Bouncer |location = [[Fight Arena (location)|Fight Arena]] |levels = 137 |members = Yes |mapID = 0 |plane = 0 |x:2608,y:3162 |mtype = pin |leagueRegion = Kandarin }} {{LocTableBottom}} ==Drops== ===100%=== {{DropsTableHead}} {{DropsLine|name=Vile ashes|quantity=1|rarity=Always}} {{DropsTableBottom}} ==Changes== {{Subject changes header}} {{Subject changes |date = 16 June 2021 |update = A Kingdom Divided |poll = A Kingdom Divided |change = Bouncer now drops [[vile ashes]] in place of regular ashes. }} {{Subject changes |date = 17 March 2021 |update = Shooting Stars |change = Several monsters, including Bouncer, were tagged as demonic, allowing demonbane weapons to work on them. }} {{Subject changes |date = 4 June 2007 |update = Hair of the dog |change = The NPC was graphically updated. }} {{Subject changes footer}} ===Gallery (historical)=== {|style="text-align: center" cellpadding="15" |[[File:Bouncer (beta).png|center|300x150px]] |[[File:Bouncer (historical).png|center|300x150px]] |[[File:Bouncer.png|center|300x150px]] |- |RuneScape 2
